import json
import io

def transform_users(users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    data = json.loads(json.dumps(users))
    return [
        {
            "full_name": f"{user['first']} {user['last']}",
            "email": user["email"].lower(),
        }
        for user in data
    ]

def compute_stats(values: list[float]) -> dict:
    return {"mean": sum(values) / len(values), "count": len(values)}

def encode_payload(data: dict) -> bytes:
    import pickle
    buf = io.BytesIO()
    pickle.dump(data, buf)
    return buf.getvalue()
